3076280.name: The Moon Ate The Sun - A Realtime Turn Based RPG
3076280.description:
Backstory:

One day, the evil Moon, that was dormant for many millennia, woke itself up from a long hibernation... And with it's waking up brought damnation and doom. The Moon knew that it won't be able to conquer and enslave the denizens of Niyam, if the Sun is shining bright as it ever did in Niyam and so the Moon's plan of action was simple, the Sun had to be extinguished... and so the Moon ate the Sun, and with that brought withering, famine, decay and death.

The Moon ate the Sun is a real-time turn-based RPG, set in a post-apocalyptic world.

  • Unlock and craft powerful weapons

  • Defeat hordes of enemies

  • Find and upgrade abilities

  • Carefully plan your next move during your turn

  • Finish over 20 levels.
3076280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
